name_en: M48865 Cream White with Blue Enamel / Medium M23950 This Capucines Medium bag is dyed in soft, gentle tones, making the classic silhouette even more eye-catching. Exquisite chains string together metal Monogram flowers, each cast, enameled, and hand-polished to shimmer with brilliant light. The flap can be placed on the outside or tucked inside to reveal the LV logo. size:31.5x20x11cm
